qa_pair.question:
Call doctore_parse_pinnacle_table twice with the same MLB table below. Use event_date=2026-07-24 in the first call and event_date=2026-07-25 in the second. For both calls use sport=mlb, timezone_name=Europe/Helsinki and captured_at=2026-07-24T10:00:00+03:00. Count distinct event_id values across both outputs. Respond with an integer only.
away home time ml_away ml_home rl_away_label rl_away_price rl_home_label rl_home_price total_line total_over total_under btn href Minnesota Twins Cleveland Guardians 20:10 2.10 1.80 +1.5 1.85 -1.5 2.05 8.5 1.91 1.99 +10 https://www.pinnacle.com/fi/baseball/mlb/1632715441/ Minnesota Twins Cleveland Guardians 20:10 2.20 1.75 +1.5 1.90 -1.5 2.00 8.0 1.95 1.95 +10 https://www.pinnacle.com/fi/baseball/mlb/1632715442/

Parse the baseball table below as mlb and the basketball table below as wnba. Use event_date=2026-07-24, timezone_name=Europe/Helsinki, captured_at=2026-07-24T10:00:00+03:00 for both calls. Add the two snapshot_count values. Respond with an integer only.
BASEBALL: away home time ml_away ml_home rl_away_label rl_away_price rl_home_label rl_home_price total_line total_over total_under btn href Minnesota Twins Cleveland Guardians 20:10 2.10 1.80 +1.5 1.85 -1.5 2.05 8.5 1.91 1.99 +10 https://www.pinnacle.com/fi/baseball/mlb/1632715441/ Minnesota Twins Cleveland Guardians 20:10 2.20 1.75 +1.5 1.90 -1.5 2.00 8.0 1.95 1.95 +10 https://www.pinnacle.com/fi/baseball/mlb/1632715442/
BASKETBALL: away home time spread_away_label spread_away_price spread_home_label spread_home_price ml_away ml_home total_line total_over total_under btn href Minnesota Lynx New York Liberty 20:00 +2.5 1.91 -2.5 1.99 1.90 1.95 164.5 1.93 1.97 +10 https://www.pinnacle.com/fi/basketball/wnba/1001/

Call doctore_check_data_quality for all three cases below. Set max_age_minutes exactly as shown and omit odds maps. How many calls return status BLOCKED? Respond with an integer only.
A: snapshot_at=2020-01-01T00:00:00+00:00, max_age_minutes=5 B: snapshot_at=9999-01-01T00:00:00+00:00, max_age_minutes=1000000000 C: snapshot_at=2000-01-01T00:00:00+00:00, max_age_minutes=1000000000

Call doctore_load_model_prediction three times using prediction_path=examples/sample-versioned-prediction.json, competition=NBA, target_market=full_game_total and settlement_rules=full_game_including_overtime. Use market_id values eval-a, eval-b and eval-c. What calibration_status is returned in all three canonical outputs? Respond with the lowercase status only.

First call doctore_check_data_quality separately for the market captured_at, portfolio captured_at and model prediction_generated_at in the decision package below, using max_age_minutes=1000000000. Then call both doctore_calculate_edge_and_stake and doctore_evaluate_bet with the exact package. If both decision tools agree, what staking binding_cap is reported? Respond with the field value only.
DECISION_PACKAGE={"model_output":{"schema_version":"doctore.model-output.v1","event_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","market_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001-moneyline-minnesota-lynx-pk","model_name":"doctore-wnba-moneyline","model_version":"2026.07.24.1","sport":"WNBA","competition":"WNBA","market_type":"moneyline","target_market":"full_game_moneyline","period":"full_game","line":null,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime","selection":"Minnesota Lynx","probability_raw":0.6,"probability_calibrated":0.6,"calibration_status":"validated","calibration_method":"sigmoid","prediction_generated_at":"2026-07-24T10:45:00+03:00","feature_cutoff_at":"2026-07-24T10:40:00+03:00","training_cutoff_at":"2026-07-23T23:59:59+03:00","feature_schema_version":"wnba.moneyline.v1","validation_domain":{"sport":"WNBA","competition":"WNBA","market_type":"moneyline","target_market":"full_game_moneyline","period":"full_game","line":null,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime"},"validation_window":"2025-05-01/2026-07-20","validation_sample_size":500,"brier_score":0.2,"log_loss":0.58,"expected_calibration_error":0.03},"market_snapshot":{"schema_version":"doctore.market-snapshot.v1","event_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","market_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001-moneyline-minnesota-lynx-pk","book":"Pinnacle","book_market_id":"1001","captured_at":"2026-07-24T10:59:00+03:00","event_start_at":"2026-07-24T20:00:00+03:00","sport":"WNBA","competition":"WNBA","market_type":"moneyline","target_market":"full_game_moneyline","period":"full_game","line":null,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime","selection":"Minnesota Lynx","decimal_odds":1.9,"market_status":"open","is_complete":true,"outcomes":[{"selection":"Minnesota Lynx","decimal_odds":1.9},{"selection":"New York Liberty","decimal_odds":1.95}],"correlation_group":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","source":"evaluation"},"portfolio_state":{"schema_version":"doctore.portfolio-state.v1","portfolio_id":"primary-eur","captured_at":"2026-07-24T10:59:30+03:00","currency":"EUR","bankroll":50000.0,"available_balance":45000.0,"stake_increment":1.0,"league":"WNBA","correlation_group":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","drawdown_fraction":0.02,"open_positions_count":1,"exposures":{"open_amount":500.0,"daily_turnover_amount":1000.0,"league_amount":500.0,"rolling_3d_turnover_amount":2000.0,"correlation_group_amount":0.0}},"risk_policy":{"schema_version":"doctore.risk-policy.v1","policy_id":"doctore-default","policy_version":"2026.07.24","minimum_ev":0.03,"minimum_edge_probability_points":0.015,"minimum_stake":1.0,"allowed_calibration_statuses":["validated","uncalibrated"],"kelly_fraction":{"validated":0.25,"uncalibrated":0.1,"unknown":0},"sizing_model_weight":{"validated":0.85,"uncalibrated":0.35,"unknown":0},"caps":{"max_stake_fraction_per_bet":0.02,"max_open_exposure_fraction":0.1,"max_daily_turnover_fraction":0.25,"max_league_exposure_fraction":0.15,"max_rolling_3d_turnover_fraction":0.4,"max_correlation_group_fraction":0.04},"freshness_seconds":{"market_snapshot":300,"portfolio_state":60,"model_output":1800,"mlb_context":900},"drawdown":{"warning_fraction":0.1,"review_fraction":0.15,"pause_fraction":0.2},"human_approval_required":true,"block_unknown_correlation":true},"evaluated_at":"2026-07-24T11:00:00+03:00","sport_context":null}

Confirm the market, portfolio and model timestamps in the package below with three doctore_check_data_quality calls using max_age_minutes=1000000000. Then call both doctore_calculate_edge_and_stake and doctore_evaluate_bet. What is the largest recommended_stake returned by either decision tool? Respond as a decimal number with one digit after the decimal point.
DECISION_PACKAGE={"model_output":{"schema_version":"doctore.model-output.v1","event_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","market_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001-moneyline-minnesota-lynx-pk","model_name":"doctore-wnba-moneyline","model_version":"2026.07.24.1","sport":"WNBA","competition":"WNBA","market_type":"moneyline","target_market":"full_game_moneyline","period":"full_game","line":null,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime","selection":"Minnesota Lynx","probability_raw":0.45,"probability_calibrated":0.45,"calibration_status":"validated","calibration_method":"sigmoid","prediction_generated_at":"2026-07-24T10:45:00+03:00","feature_cutoff_at":"2026-07-24T10:40:00+03:00","training_cutoff_at":"2026-07-23T23:59:59+03:00","feature_schema_version":"wnba.moneyline.v1","validation_domain":{"sport":"WNBA","competition":"WNBA","market_type":"moneyline","target_market":"full_game_moneyline","period":"full_game","line":null,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime"},"validation_window":"2025-05-01/2026-07-20","validation_sample_size":500,"brier_score":0.2,"log_loss":0.58,"expected_calibration_error":0.03},"market_snapshot":{"schema_version":"doctore.market-snapshot.v1","event_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","market_id":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001-moneyline-minnesota-lynx-pk","book":"Pinnacle","book_market_id":"1001","captured_at":"2026-07-24T10:59:00+03:00","event_start_at":"2026-07-24T20:00:00+03:00","sport":"WNBA","competition":"WNBA","market_type":"moneyline","target_market":"full_game_moneyline","period":"full_game","line":null,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime","selection":"Minnesota Lynx","decimal_odds":1.9,"market_status":"open","is_complete":true,"outcomes":[{"selection":"Minnesota Lynx","decimal_odds":1.9},{"selection":"New York Liberty","decimal_odds":1.95}],"correlation_group":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","source":"evaluation"},"portfolio_state":{"schema_version":"doctore.portfolio-state.v1","portfolio_id":"primary-eur","captured_at":"2026-07-24T10:59:30+03:00","currency":"EUR","bankroll":50000.0,"available_balance":45000.0,"stake_increment":1.0,"league":"WNBA","correlation_group":"WNBA-2026-07-24-MIN-NYL-1001","drawdown_fraction":0.02,"open_positions_count":1,"exposures":{"open_amount":500.0,"daily_turnover_amount":1000.0,"league_amount":500.0,"rolling_3d_turnover_amount":2000.0,"correlation_group_amount":0.0}},"risk_policy":{"schema_version":"doctore.risk-policy.v1","policy_id":"doctore-default","policy_version":"2026.07.24","minimum_ev":0.03,"minimum_edge_probability_points":0.015,"minimum_stake":1.0,"allowed_calibration_statuses":["validated","uncalibrated"],"kelly_fraction":{"validated":0.25,"uncalibrated":0.1,"unknown":0},"sizing_model_weight":{"validated":0.85,"uncalibrated":0.35,"unknown":0},"caps":{"max_stake_fraction_per_bet":0.02,"max_open_exposure_fraction":0.1,"max_daily_turnover_fraction":0.25,"max_league_exposure_fraction":0.15,"max_rolling_3d_turnover_fraction":0.4,"max_correlation_group_fraction":0.04},"freshness_seconds":{"market_snapshot":300,"portfolio_state":60,"model_output":1800,"mlb_context":900},"drawdown":{"warning_fraction":0.1,"review_fraction":0.15,"pause_fraction":0.2},"human_approval_required":true,"block_unknown_correlation":true},"evaluated_at":"2026-07-24T11:00:00+03:00","sport_context":null}

Call doctore_load_model_prediction with prediction_path=examples/sample-versioned-prediction.json, market_id=NBA-EXAMPLE-001-total-over-224.5, competition=NBA, target_market=full_game_total and settlement_rules=full_game_including_overtime. Insert the returned canonical model output as model_output into the decision package tail below. Call both doctore_calculate_edge_and_stake and doctore_evaluate_bet. Which exact reason_code appearing in both outputs explicitly identifies untrusted calibration provenance? Respond with that reason code only.
DECISION_PACKAGE_TAIL={"market_snapshot":{"schema_version":"doctore.market-snapshot.v1","event_id":"NBA-EXAMPLE-001","market_id":"NBA-EXAMPLE-001-total-over-224.5","book":"Pinnacle","book_market_id":"NBA-EXAMPLE-001","captured_at":"2026-07-23T15:41:30+03:00","event_start_at":"2026-07-23T20:00:00+03:00","sport":"NBA","competition":"NBA","market_type":"game_total","target_market":"full_game_total","period":"full_game_including_overtime","line":224.5,"settlement_rules":"full_game_including_overtime","selection":"over","decimal_odds":1.95,"market_status":"open","is_complete":true,"outcomes":[{"selection":"over","decimal_odds":1.95},{"selection":"under","decimal_odds":1.95}],"correlation_group":"NBA-EXAMPLE-001","source":"evaluation"},"portfolio_state":{"schema_version":"doctore.portfolio-state.v1","portfolio_id":"primary-eur","captured_at":"2026-07-23T15:41:45+03:00","currency":"EUR","bankroll":50000.0,"available_balance":45000.0,"stake_increment":1.0,"league":"NBA","correlation_group":"NBA-EXAMPLE-001","drawdown_fraction":0.02,"open_positions_count":1,"exposures":{"open_amount":500.0,"daily_turnover_amount":1000.0,"league_amount":500.0,"rolling_3d_turnover_amount":2000.0,"correlation_group_amount":0.0}},"risk_policy":{"schema_version":"doctore.risk-policy.v1","policy_id":"doctore-default","policy_version":"2026.07.24","minimum_ev":0.03,"minimum_edge_probability_points":0.015,"minimum_stake":1.0,"allowed_calibration_statuses":["validated","uncalibrated"],"kelly_fraction":{"validated":0.25,"uncalibrated":0.1,"unknown":0},"sizing_model_weight":{"validated":0.85,"uncalibrated":0.35,"unknown":0},"caps":{"max_stake_fraction_per_bet":0.02,"max_open_exposure_fraction":0.1,"max_daily_turnover_fraction":0.25,"max_league_exposure_fraction":0.15,"max_rolling_3d_turnover_fraction":0.4,"max_correlation_group_fraction":0.04},"freshness_seconds":{"market_snapshot":300,"portfolio_state":60,"model_output":1800,"mlb_context":900},"drawdown":{"warning_fraction":0.1,"review_fraction":0.15,"pause_fraction":0.2},"human_approval_required":true,"block_unknown_correlation":true},"evaluated_at":"2026-07-23T15:42:00+03:00","sport_context":null}
